title: Umami Creamy Canadian Beetroot Soup
description: A velvety beetroot soup infused with a savory umami kick and creamy coconut milk, perfect for a show‑off Canadian dinner that’s gentle on blood sugar.
instructions: Preheat oven to 200°C (400°F). Toss beetroot cubes with 1 tsp olive oil, salt, and pepper, and roast on a sheet for 25 minutes until tender.
Meanwhile, heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and carrot, sauté for 5 minutes until softened.
Add garlic and smoked paprika, cooking for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a gentle boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
Stir in roasted beetroot, miso paste, soy sauce, and thyme. Simmer for another 5 minutes to combine flavors.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly, then puree the soup using an immersion blender or countertop blender until smooth.
Stir in coconut milk, taste and adjust seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
Serve hot, garnishing with a swirl of coconut cream and a sprinkle of fresh thyme if desired.
